appraisal.description: A worn cloth doll shedding grey fabric dust from seams that have been repaired too many times.

clues.result: The stitched smile was resewn with thread taken from several different garments.
UV light reveals small handprints pressed into the back of the dress.
The doll is coldest around the chest seam, not the exposed fabric.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If sent away loose, the thread spells names across a nursery wall.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Moth-Eaten Doll.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Moth-Eaten Doll.
